Risk: Pipeline writes gpt.html/legal.html in repo root but leaves build/gpt.html stale; two artifact locations diverge
Impact: Team can validate wrong artifact and publish stale UI
Recommended fix: Choose one artifact path (dist/index.html + gpt.html), delete/stop using build/gpt.html

Risk: Deploy script publishes dist/index.html to index.html on server; docs declare index.html as source in repo
Impact: Confusion between source template and deployed one-file output
Recommended fix: "Document strict dev/prod paths and enforce with CI check"

Risk: Monolith is active runtime, but parallel modular tree exists and is not wired into build
Impact: Future edits can land in dead modules and never reach production
Recommended fix: "Either wire modules into build or archive dead tree"

Where: src/styles/main.css vs src/styles/base/**, layout/**, components/**, features/**
Risk: main.css is canonical runtime while split CSS tree exists but not imported
Impact: High chance of editing unused files

Risk: Large patch-driven history and backup artifacts increase ambiguity
Recommended fix: "Keep non-runtime assets strictly in archive and lock with lint/CI"

Risk: Many sections duplicated in dedicated mobile markup with different IDs and content density
Impact: Content and behavior drift across modes
Recommended fix: "Normalize through shared data render functions where possible"

Risk: Compact/mobile modal clones full sections by DOM clone and strips IDs
Impact: Hidden coupling; interactive elements rely on event delegation only
Recommended fix: "Keep a whitelist of interactive selectors and test each cloned section"

Risk: Runtime relies on global config injected in page HTML
Impact: Environment misconfig can silently break lead delivery
Recommended fix: "Add startup assert and visible health indicator in debug mode"

Risk: Single mutable state object controls all modes/flows without schema guard on load
Recommended fix: "Validate loaded state and enforce narrow transitions"

Risk: No guard to ensure build/gpt.html, gpt.html, dist/index.html synchronized
Recommended fix: "Add checksum verification step in build/release checklist"
